reason_for_decision: The article clears the pass threshold with strong consequence-driven framing, useful protection-architecture guidance, and disciplined non-promotional writing.
strengths: The piece starts from consequence and dependency mapping rather than hardware shopping, which improves its decision usefulness.
It connects surveillance design to continuity and recovery logic instead of treating infrastructure security as a device-only problem.
The article stays operational and concrete, especially around command-layer integration and escalation ownership.
summary_assessment: This is a strong knowledge-base article for infrastructure security planning. It is practical, coherent, and grounded in operational consequences rather than generic protection language.
